title: Bubbles agent RESULT-ENVELOPE (machine-readable, v5.1 / M3)
description: Structured form of the markdown RESULT-ENVELOPE every Bubbles agent emits. Workflow agent parses the JSON instead of grepping prose. Markdown envelope MUST still be emitted alongside for human readability — JSON envelope is additive, not a replacement.

spec.description: Spec slug (e.g. '042-foo'). Empty for framework-level invocations.

outcome.description: One of the four canonical outcomes from Gate G063 (concrete_result_gate).

evidenceRefs.description: References to evidence: report.md anchors, tool-log session ids, file paths, commit SHAs.

owner.description: Agent name responsible for closing this finding.

addressedFindings.description: IDs from a prior packet's findings[] that this invocation closed.

unresolvedFindings.description: IDs from a prior packet's findings[] that this invocation could not close. MUST be empty when outcome=completed_owned.

nextOwner.description: Required when outcome=route_required. Agent name expected to act next.

blocker.description: Required when outcome=blocked. Describes concretely what prevents progress.

continuation.description: Optional continuation envelope for advisory/read-only surfaces.

toolCalls.description: Session ids from tool-calls.jsonl that prove this invocation's claims. Read by v5.2 evidence gate.
